title: French Smoked Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful dish combining the richness of smoke with a touch of French elegance.
instructions: Arrange bread slices on a baking sheet and toast for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Spread a layer of butter on each toasted bread slice.
Top each bread slice with a slice of smoked salmon.
Sprinkle freshly ground peppercorns over the salmon.
Place the baking sheet under the broiler and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the salmon is cooked through.
Garnish with eclair pastry and serve immediately.
